label: 概率填充
description: 概率/数量两模式的随机栅格填充，输出与输入同形状的 0/1 点掩码（保留格=1）。mode=density（默认）对每个有效格独立以 density 概率保留为 1（density=1 满铺、0 全空），纯逐格伯努利采样；mode=count 改为精确格数填充：未接 edge 时把候选有效格洗牌取前 count 个（fillRandomCount），接了 edge 第二输入时把有效格按是否属于 edge 拆成边格/内格、分别洗牌后拼接（边优先）取前 count 个（fillEdgeCount，边缘优先的精确格数填充）。可用于作物点位、草丛/碎石散布、精确数量布点等场景。
description-en: Random raster fill in density or count mode, emitting a 0/1 point mask matching the input shape. mode=density (default) keeps each valid cell as 1 with probability density (1 = full, 0 = empty) via pure per-cell Bernoulli sampling; mode=count fills an exact number of cells: without an edge input, shuffle candidate cells and take the first count (fillRandomCount); with an edge second input, split valid cells into edge/inner by the edge mask, shuffle each and concatenate (edge first), taking the first count (fillEdgeCount, edge-priority exact-count fill). Usable for crop points, grass/pebble scatter, exact-count placement, etc.
icon: 深色背景上一片区域内随机散布密集的小点，疏密体现填充密度，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；只在非零有效格内做概率采样。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; sampling only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: edge
inputs.label: 边缘掩码
inputs.description: 可选第二输入，仅 count 模式生效：非零格视为边格，有效格中其余为内格；填充按边优先取前 count（fillEdgeCount）。
inputs.description-en: Optional second input, count mode only: non-zero cells are edge cells, remaining valid cells are inner; fill takes the first count edge-first (fillEdgeCount).

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: 填充模式
inputs.description: density=按概率逐格伯努利采样（默认，向后兼容）；count=精确格数填充。
inputs.description-en: density = per-cell Bernoulli sampling by probability (default, backward compatible); count = exact-count fill.

inputs.name: density
inputs.label: 填充密度
inputs.description: density 模式：每个有效格保留为 1 的概率，0..1。1=满铺，0=全空。
inputs.description-en: density mode: probability of keeping each valid cell as 1, 0..1. 1 = full coverage, 0 = empty.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 目标格数
inputs.description: count 模式：精确保留的格数（超过有效格数则取全部）。
inputs.description-en: count mode: exact number of cells to keep (clamped to the number of valid cells).

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 填充网格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 0/1 点掩码，保留格=1，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: A 0/1 point mask matching the input shape; kept cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 保留格数
outputs.description: 实际保留为 1 的格数。
outputs.description-en: Number of cells actually kept as 1.
